# Sim Reaney — Complete Site Context & Documentation

> Full text context compiled automatically for LLMs and research crawlers.
> Primary focus: Catchment Hydrology, Diffuse Pollution Modeling, Natural Flood Management (NFM), and Spatial Environmental Modeling.

---

## 1. Key Pages

{% assign static_pages = site.pages | sort: "title" %}
{% for page in static_pages %}
  {% if page.content != empty and page.title and page.url != "/llms-full.txt" and page.url != "/llms.txt" %}
### {{ page.title }}
**URL:** {{ page.url | prepend: site.url }}

{{ page.content | strip_html | strip_newlines | replace: '  ', ' ' }}

---
  {% endif %}
{% endfor %}
